overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban market district at night, featuring neon-lit Japanese-inspired architecture, bustling pedestrian areas, and transitions from covered walkways to open courtyards and narrow market streets. The footage is from a video game engine with high-quality ray-traced lighting and reflective wet surfaces.

segments.scene_description: Entering an open courtyard surrounded by buildings, featuring glowing floor panels that change color from cyan to red. segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow market street dense with neon signs, red paper lanterns strung overhead, and food stalls. A black vehicle is parked in the street while vendors serve customers at various counters.

scene_state.functional_zone: deeper market corridor with vending machines and advertisements

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered elevated walkway into the dense, neon-saturated depths of a cyberpunk market district. It begins along a covered path lined with digital billboards and red paper lanterns, moving steadily toward the glow of an open courtyard. As the camera enters this plaza, the environment opens up to reveal color-shifting floor panels and a luminous cherry blossom tree before descending a set of stairs into a lower commercial hub dominated by massive digital signage and industrial piping. The scene then shifts from the open plaza into a narrow, crowded market street filled with food stalls and parked vehicles, where the lighting becomes more concentrated. Finally, the path leads deeper into the district past glowing vending machines as the atmosphere darkens into a purple-hued corridor ending at a distant stairway.
